settings.text: The powerful six-bar linkage rear suspension is a unique technology of Maxfoot. With the use of the six-bar linkage rear suspension and the front fork suspension, you will feel extremely comfortable when riding. It's a true soft-tail electric bicycle.

5 Inch LCD Display
Maxfoot LCD display shows very clear, and the parameters are complete. You can clearly check the status of the bicycle even when riding in the hot sun. At the same time, it comes with a USB port. You can charge your mobile device through the display when you need.

Quick Folding
The folding Hinge simplifies the unlocking mechanism as much as possible while preventing accidental unlocking and ensuring safety. It is solid and secure after locking, and very simple when you need to unlock it.

7-Speed Freewheel
A wider range of gearing at your disposal means more torque for treacherous uphill climbs and maintain pedal authority at top speed. Conquer various terrains easily.

Multi-Mode Tail Light
Tail light powered by the main battery of the bike. It comes with 3 working modes: Steady, Flash and Highlight. This multifunctional tail light is one of the safety guarantees for riders when riding.

Bafang Motor
With 1000W at your disposal, this Bafang brushless geared hub Motor is what is going to help power you up steep inclines and get you up to top speed quickly from a dead stop, all while remaining quiet and inconspicuous.

Large Capacity Battery
The large-capacity battery from SAMSUNG provides strong energy support for the MF-19's riding range. With PAS system, the riding range can even reach an amazing 60 miles. You just have to ride and don’t need to worry about battery range.

settings.text: The large-capacity battery from SAMSUNG provides strong energy support for the MF-19's riding range. With PAS system, the riding range can even reach an amazing 60 miles. You just have to ride and don’t need to worry about battery range.

All-terrain suspension fork of MF-19 comes with working switch and it can work up to 80mm travel range. It made with numerical controlled precision bending for improved shockproof durability, allows for good riding condition over all terrain.

Maxfoot LCD display shows very clear, and the parameters are complete. You can clearly check the status of the bicycle even when riding in the hot sun. At the same time, it comes with a USB port. You can charge your mobile device through the display when you need.

The Maxfoot MF-19 headlight is integrated into the bike’s design and provides a bright light source for night riding. It is powered by the bike’s battery and designed to be durable and long-lasting. The angle is also adjustable, allowing riders to adjust the headlight to suit their needs.

The tail light of MF-19 provides 3 working mode for riders to alert vehicles behind: 1. Braking Highlight Mode. 2. Riding Constant Light Mode. 3. Strobe Alert Mode. Riders can choose the working mode as they need. It is powered by the bike’s battery and designed to be durable and long-lasting.
